zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Burnet於1643年出生在英國蘇格蘭素斯 藍納可爾可萊時，她的父親John Burnet of Kailzia30歲，母親Helen Bailie25歲。她於1672年12月26日與Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1703年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州南蒙德享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Burnet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (central and eastern Scotland): variant of   Burnett  .
French: status name or topographic name from a shortened derivative of   Buron   ‘hut, cottage’.

variants.name: Burnett
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Tyrone and Antrim): descriptive nickname of Norman origin, from Old French burnete, a diminutive of brun ‘brown’ (see Brown ), or possibly in some instances a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of burnete, a high quality woolen cloth, originally dark brown in color.
Probably also an altered form of English   Barnett  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Burnet  ; compare   Burnette  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Burnet was born in 1643, in Cleghorn, South Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Burnet of Kailzia, was 30 and her mother, Helen Bailie, was 25. She married Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr on 26 December 1672, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1703, in Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Burnet est née en 1643, à Cleghorn, South Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Burnet of Kailzia, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Helen Bailie, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr le 26 décembre 1672, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1703, à Nansemond, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.Nansemond, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 난젬드
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Burnet(이)가 1643년 영국 스코틀랜드 소우스 랜아르크실르 클레고른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Burnet of Kailzia(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Bailie(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1672년 12월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1703년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 난젬드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Burnet родилась в 1643 г. в местности клегаурн, соут ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Burnet of Kailzia было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Bailie, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Capt James Horatio Lockhart Sr 26 декабря 1672 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1703 г. в местности нансемонд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет.
